model.description: ID of the model that will generate the response (e.g., gpt-4.1, gpt-4o, gpt-5, Qwen/Qwen3-4B).

openai_api_key.description: The API Key of OpenAI. Use 'EMPTY' for SGLang/vLLM servers that do not require authentication.

base_url.description: Optional custom base URL for OpenAI-compatible servers (e.g., http://127.0.0.1:30000/v1 for SGLang).

max_tokens.description: Hard cap on tokens in the model's reply. Legacy field; prefer max_completion_tokens for newer models.

max_completion_tokens.description: Hard cap on completion tokens. Preferred over max_tokens for newer OpenAI models. If both are set, this takes precedence.

temperature.description: Sampling temperature; higher values increase randomness.

presence_penalty.description: Penalty for repeating tokens already in the conversation.

frequency_penalty.description: Penalty for repeating the same tokens frequently.

seed.description: Seed for deterministic sampling. Supported by OpenAI and SGLang.

logit_bias.description: Token ID to bias value mapping (-100 to 100). Supported by SGLang.

extra_body.description: Passthrough object for provider-specific body fields (e.g., SGLang chat_template_kwargs/separate_reasoning or Z.AI GLM thinking).

extra_headers.description: Passthrough object for additional HTTP request headers (e.g., proxy auth, request tracing, custom routing headers). Forwarded verbatim to chat.completions.create().

extra_query.description: Passthrough object for additional URL query string parameters. Forwarded verbatim to chat.completions.create().

enable_thinking.description: SGLang/Qwen3 shorthand: when true, the handler adds chat_template_kwargs.enable_thinking=true to extra_body. Overridden by any value the caller sets explicitly in extra_body.

separate_reasoning.description: SGLang shorthand: when true, the handler adds separate_reasoning=true to extra_body so the server splits reasoning into the reasoning_content field. Overridden by any value the caller sets explicitly in extra_body.

reasoning_effort.description: Reasoning effort for Chat Completions endpoints that implement this parameter, including zai.glm-5 through Bedrock Mantle. Direct Z.AI GLM endpoints configure thinking through extra_body.thinking instead.

enable_think_tag_split.description: When true, the streaming handler scans content for inline <think>...</think> blocks and routes them to the reasoning channel. Enable only for servers that fail to populate delta.reasoning_content and emit raw <think> tags instead (e.g. vLLM with GLM-5 hitting parser bug #29763, DeepSeek/Qwen3 without a reasoning parser flag). Off by default.

debug_log_request_messages.description: When true, log a truncated JSON dump of the `messages` array (up to 8000 chars) before every chat.completions.create() call, tagged [REQUEST_MESSAGES]. Diagnostic only — use to inspect on-wire message shape when a provider rejects the request. Off by default; noisy in production.

tool_history_compatibility.description: Controls follow-up requests after tool execution. 'strict' preserves standard Chat Completions assistant.tool_calls plus role:tool messages. 'flatten' renders prior tool calls/results as plain text for provider templates that reject strict tool history. 'auto' enables flattening only for known incompatible providers such as Together.ai GLM.

instructions_role.description: Where to put the agent's instructions. 'system' (default) emits a leading system message; 'developer' is for newer OpenAI models; 'user' merges the instructions into the first user message and is required for models like Gemma whose chat templates reject the system role.

tools.description: Function declarations compatible with OpenAI Chat Completions API.

parallel_tool_calls.description: Whether to allow the model to call multiple tools in parallel.

enabled_tools.description: Subset of tool names to enable. Other tools are filtered out at initialization.

max_retries.description: Maximum number of SDK-level retries for transient errors (rate limit, timeout, connection). Applied to the OpenAI client, not empty-response retries.

request_timeout_seconds.description: Total request timeout in seconds for the httpx client.

connect_timeout_seconds.description: Connection timeout in seconds for the httpx client.

pool_max_connections.description: Maximum number of connections in the httpx pool.

pool_max_keepalive_connections.description: Maximum number of keep-alive connections in the httpx pool.

max_tool_call_depth.description: Maximum recursion depth for tool-call chains. Exceeding this raises ToolCallDepthExceeded.
